title: [Silvergate Inn, Locker]
description: With the curtain closed behind you, all sound from outside the locker area has been hushed.  The counter is topped with deep green baize which shows little wear.

wayto.27904: ;e room = Room.current.id;fput 'go curtain'; if ( room == Room.current.id ); fput 'close locker';move 'go curtain'; end
